Table DCS_ORDERITEM

Card of table DCS_ORDERITEM

Name

DCS_ORDERITEM

Code

DCS_ORDERITEM

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table DCS_ORDERITEM

---------------------- Pseudocode ----------------------------------

 

 

 

 

1. Initialize a new table in the Presentation Layer in "DB_CONS_PL_(env)" under "PL_CONSUMERORDER" schema

called "DCS_ORDERITEM".

 

2. Define the Columns, based on the script provided.

Consider the data type for Implementation -

Text as varchar(16777216)

Integer as Number(38,0)

Date&Time as Timestamp

 

3. Define the Constraints

Primary Key (Unique Record Identifier):

DCS_ORDERITEM_KEY = MD5(Concatenation of(ORDER_ID, ITEM_ID, MARKET_CODE))

 

 

4. Save the table definition.

 

5. Maintain Data Dictionary

i. Add the column description to each column (from Comment tab in PD).

ii. Mention the Data Classification & PII category for each column and mask them as per standard guideline.

 

6. The result in the target object must stay deduplicated.

 

7. Follow the Entity & Attribute level Business Rules defined.

 

8. Run the RLS specific script based on the MARKET_CODE (applicable for QAS & Prod).

 

 

 

 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------- Load Type -----------------------------------------------------------------

SCD1

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

 


Check constraint name of the table DCS_ORDERITEM

CKT_DCS_ORDERITEM


Server validation rule of the table DCS_ORDERITEM

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DCS_ORDERITEM

drop table DCS_ORDERITEM cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DCS_ORDERITEM
--==============================================================
create or replace table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM (
DCS_ORDERITEM_KEY TEXT not null,
ITEM_ID INTEGER not null,
ORDER_ID INTEGER not null,
PRODUCT_ID INTEGER,
PRODUCT_CODE TEXT,
PRICE DECIMAL(38,4),
AMOUNT INTEGER,
DEVICE_CODENTIFY TEXT,
GTIN TEXT,
UOM TEXT,
MAKTX TEXT,
CON_SPP INTEGER,
CON_PPB INTEGER,
PIECE INTEGER,
PRODUCT TEXT,
ISSUE_ID TEXT,
RETURNED_DATE TEXT,
DEVICE_CODENTIFY_NEW TEXT,
VARIANT_NAME TEXT,
MARKET_CODE TEXT not null,
DCS_ORDER_KEY TEXT not null,
constraint PK_DCS_ORDERITEM primary key (DCS_ORDERITEM_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.DCS_ORDERITEM_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier.';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.ITEM_ID is
'DCS order item identifier on order. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.ORDER_ID is
'Order Identifier. ';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.PRODUCT_ID is
'DCS product unique identifier';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.PRODUCT_CODE is
'Code of product';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.PRICE is
'Price of the product';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.AMOUNT is
'Quantity of the items';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.DEVICE_CODENTIFY is
'UDD device codentify - value used to identify an item produced by PMI';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.GTIN is
'SEA product details - GTIN code';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.UOM is
'SEA product details - "Pack", "Bundle", "Piece"';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.MAKTX is
'SEA product details - Sales text field';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.CON_SPP is
'SEA product details - Sticks per pack';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.CON_PPB is
'SEA product details - Packs per bundle';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.PIECE is
'SEA product details - Piece';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.PRODUCT is
'Product details - Product name';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.ISSUE_ID is
'If order added through case management, issue identifier';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.RETURNED_DATE is
'Date time when product was returned';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.DEVICE_CODENTIFY_NEW is
'If replacement order, describes the UDD device codentify of the new device';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.VARIANT_NAME is
'Product variant name (field name on Odata is variant)';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.MARKET_CODE is
'Identifier for the Market -> 2 letter Country Code + ''04''';

comment on column PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM.DCS_ORDER_KEY is
'Primary Key. Unique record identifier.';

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM
add constraint FK_DCS_ORDE_R20_PRODU_DCS_PROD foreign key (MARKET_CODE)
references PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PRODUCT (DCS_PRODUCT_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM
add constraint FK_DCS_ORDE_R21_ORDER_DCS_ORDE foreign key (DCS_ORDER_KEY)
references PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER (DCS_ORDER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM
add constraint FK_DCS_ORDE_R2_ORDER__DCS_ORDE foreign key (ORDER_ID)
references PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDER (DCS_ORDER_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;

alter table PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_ORDERITEM
add constraint FK_DCS_ORDE_R3_PRODUC_DCS_PROD foreign key (PRODUCT_ID)
references PL_CONSUMERORDER.DCS_PRODUCT (DCS_PRODUCT_KEY)
not enforced not deferrable;
